name: DLL Side-Loading via Microsoft Defender Binaries
description: Detection of a DLL side-loading attempt involving Microsoft Defender executables loading mpclient.dll from a non-standard path.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the DLL load event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the DLL side-loading occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: ProcessImage
parameters.description: The full path to the Microsoft Defender executable that loaded the DLL.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the loaded DLL (mpclient.dll) from the suspicious path.

parameters.name: OriginalFileName
parameters.description: The original file name of the loaded DLL.

parameters.name: Company
parameters.description: The company name of the loaded DLL.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the ProcessImage.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The parent process of the ProcessImage.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (expected to be 7).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the event, if available.
